h1b9b198cgea0cg40d0gac72g738c773aaf1f: One moment they were embracing each other in intimacy, the next they're embracing only death.
h038730dag4b99g40a0ga35egaec7c10642b5: Can't say I'm proud of our actions here.

h9b90a236ga963g49b6gb5b9g6efe9c668b0d: Don't get me wrong, I know they'd have gladly made us their post-coital picnic given half a chance.
h5ce1b3f5gc541g489cg95ddgd36d61c97db5: It just feels wrong to turn lovemaking into life-taking.
h33289b44g8fa6g46edgb245gf93ccc991285: Playing it a bit fast and loose with the word 'intimacy' there, Gale.

h231fe765g18d2g498fgbf6cg5f686ad6b1ed: Don't dwell on it. Ogres and bugbears are nothing but vermin.
